caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a gold chain, and a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" printed across the chest. He is positioned in front of a professional broadcast microphone attached to a black boom arm. He wears headphones over his ears and is looking toward someone off-screen to the right. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring several gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" above larger text that partially says "TALK". A black mug sits on the desk to the right, featuring the red and white text "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while continuing to look toward the right side of the frame.
